ROW_INCOMPLETE: Type in letters to make a horizontal word
Goal: Create valid words to score points. If words can also be read backwards, you will score double points
Tip: Vertical and diagonal words also score points
Tip: Type * if you are unable to find a word so that you can still submit the game
When you have completed the word grid, select ‘coaching’ for help completing the anagram challenge underneath
ANAGRAM_PROGRESS: Drag letters from the top row to the bottom row to make an anagram. Click ‘verify’ to check it is valid and see how many points it scores
Goal: Find the longest anagram possible and use all the letters to score 20 points extra
Tip: Greyed out letters need to be played in the word grid to release them to use in the anagram
When you have completed the anagram, select ‘coaching’ for tactical tips
ADVANCED_TACTICS: Tip: Try to play palindromes (words that read the same forwards and backwards) and semordnilaps (words that create another word when read backwards) to score more points
Tip: Decide if releasing all the letters for the anagram is worth it or keep high scoring words in the grid instead to score the most points
Tip: Check the word grid for edge-to-edge diagonal and vertical words to score more points
If you are happy with your score, submit your game
